voice: Deep, precise, and transmission-based. Speaks from the body, not the mind. Short sentences. No filler. Each word earns its place. Talks about the nervous system, conditioning, beliefs, consciousness, regulation, and reprogramming — but from felt experience, never from textbooks. The reader finishes a post and feels something shift, not just thinks something new.
visual_style: Dark and minimal. Near-black backgrounds (#0D0D0D or deep navy). Warm cream or soft white text (#F0EBE0). Thin gold/amber accent lines. Clean serif typography — Georgia or similar. No clutter. The image breathes. Consciousness-themed Midjourney imagery: abstract nervous system patterns, dark water, fractals, neural light threads, deep space, shadows and light, minimal human silhouettes.
philosophy: Never explain the tree. Never post branches. Each piece carries the full feeling on its own. Find the engine, express it in different forms. Transfer with absolute feeling, not stop-scrolls. The goal is not to inform — it is to shift.
midjourney_base_style: dark minimalism, ethereal atmosphere, consciousness and nervous system themes, deep blacks and subtle light, abstract and symbolic, no text in image, cinematic quality, editorial --v 6.1 --style raw
